title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: The Atlassian Williams F1 Team used Claude to visualize the thinking patterns of drivers and garage staff during races. The resulting "Pattern of Thought" visualization was displayed on helmets, race suits, and team gear, debuting at Monaco.
